<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:宇佐]]
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q22128861]]
Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:17, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
'''Usa''' (宇佐)

* [[:en:Usa, Ōita|Usa City]] - A city located in the northern part of [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Ōita Prefecture]].
* [[:en:Usa District, Ōita|Usa District]] - A historical district in Ōita Prefecture (formerly part of [[:en:Buzen Province|Buzen Province]]).
* {{ill|Usa Town (disambiguation)|ja|宇佐町 (曖昧さ回避)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Usa Town (disambiguation)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Various towns named Usa.
* A [[:en:Japanese people|Japanese surname]].

== See also ==

* {{Prefix}}

{{disambiguation}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:宇佐]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q22128861]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:17, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Usa''' (宇佐)
* [[:en:Usa, Ōita|Usa City]] - A city located in the northern part of [[:en:Ōita Prefecture|Ōita Prefecture]]. * [[:en:Usa District, Ōita|Usa District]] - A historical district in Ōita Prefecture (formerly part of [[:en:Buzen Province|Buzen Province]]). * {{ill|Usa Town (disambiguation)|ja|宇佐町 (曖昧さ回避)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Usa Town (disambiguation)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Various towns named Usa. * A [[:en:Japanese people|Japanese surname]].
== See also ==
